message:
style(func): rustfmt reformats sign() test array literal

cargo fmt --all reformatted the inline array in
test_sign_nan_inf_text_returns_null from a single-line `&["NaN", "nan",
"inf", ...]` to a multi-line vertical layout. No content change — the
array elements and test logic are identical.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
